what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that declares an attachment (att-adaea7d7) in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, and points it at board item item-82dce2f1 via a board:// URI with an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter; there is no body content.
standouts: Empty body — only metadata is present.
Use of a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item.
Typed attachment relationship (board_items) without inline explanation.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
References an external entity with a URI-style identifier.
concerns: No payload or description accompanies the attachment.
The semantics of board_items are not defined in this file.
The referenced board item content is not included, so the attachment cannot be interpreted standalone.
notes: A bare, timestamped metadata stub that links a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-82dce2f1.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?

purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment record and it records a typed attachment to a board item.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference linking between channels and boards.
intention_signals: It appears intended to preserve a durable association between a channel attachment and a specific board item, so the channel memory can be located from the board context and vice versa.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as a cross-substrate pointer from a channel attachment to a board item.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting context retrieval across substrates without duplicating content.
